title: View Model
description: A mod that allows you to independently change the position, scale, rotation of objects in your hands!
body:
# Description:

**[ENG]** A mod that allows you to independently change the position, scale, rotation of objects in your hands!

**[RUS]** Мод, позволяющий самостоятельно изменять положение, масштаб, вращение предметов в ваших руках!

# Language:

**[ENG]** The mod supports two languages: English and Russian.

**[RUS]** Мод поддерживает два языка: Английский и Русский.

# For questions:

**PLEASE WRITE ABOUT ALL PROBLEMS / MOD NOT WORKING, I WILL TRY TO SOLVE THEM AS SOON AS POSSIBLE!!!!**

[Issue / Questions / Ideas](https://github.com/deadlyPig/ViewModel/issues)
